ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the optimization */,
  "LL_dynamic_01_a" REAL /* Dynamic parameter a */,
  "LL_dynamic_01_b" REAL /* Dynamic parameter b */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed used for randomization */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time allocated for the optimization run */,
  "bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound for the optimization */,
  "solved" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the optimization was solved (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Additional constraints used in the optimization */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding configuration used for the optimization */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the optimization */,
  "objective_value" REAL /* Objective value reached by the optimization */,
  "iteration_count" INTEGER /* Number of iterations taken to reach the result */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Total runtime of the optimization process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization run (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Additional constraints used in the optimization */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the result entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the result entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user to whom the permissions apply */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view configurations */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can edit configurations */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can delete configurations */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the session */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the optimization */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the optimization session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the optimization session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Additional constraints used in the optimization */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the session */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_sessions_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., max_iterations, timeout) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization session in which the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was logged */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the error log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the error log entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES optimization_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result to which the report is related */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the optimization */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Additional constraints used in the optimization */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the generated report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
